column1: #   SEQUENTIAL  — VU N always uses row (N-1) % total_rows  (deterministic)

#   callee    → called party number / URI user part
#   aor       → full Address-of-Record (optional; built from username+domain if absent)
# Add any extra columns you need — they are passed through as raw strings
